reason_or_evidence: Prior registry had no biological identity, exact H1/H2 tuple, native H1 annotation, callable mask, or phase/collapse audit; this was inspected but never treated as an acquisition result.

The annotated RefSeq H1 GCF_963259705.1 still links the historical GCA_963242275.1 alternate, but that exact H2 returns no current Datasets report and NCBI published new GCA_963259705.2/GCA_963242275.2 hap1/hap2 releases on 2026-07-15 without an exact native H1 annotation. Mixing .1 annotation with .2 FASTA is forbidden.

Authoritative inventory contains historical GCA_963242275.1_mMyoDau2.1_alternate_haplotype and current GCA_963242275.2_mMyoDau2.hap2.2 side by side; no version-consistent current H1-native annotation tuple was promoted.

Authoritative inventory contains GCA_963259705.1_mMyoDau2.1 and GCA_963259705.2_mMyoDau2.hap1.2; the 2026-07-15 replacement made the prior local .1 candidate unsuitable for a new frozen current tuple.
Current chromosome assemblies; exact reciprocal GCA_048126635.1 haplotype_1/GCA_048127205.1 haplotype_2 links; same SK-2024b isolate; exact H1 annotation GCA_048126635.1-GB_2025_08_04.
H1 FASTA, original exact-assembly GFF, assembly report/stats, and provider MD5 ledger acquired and verified.
Linked H2 FASTA and assembly report/stats acquired and provider MD5 verified.
Current H1 is GCA_013358685.2 but the inventory annotation name is GCA_013358685.1-GB_2025_09_20; exact assembly/native-annotation version gate failed, so ranking continued.
Current chromosome assemblies; exact reciprocal GCA_048628825.1 haplotype_1/GCA_048544195.1 haplotype_2 links; same male fMenMen1 isolate; exact H1 annotation GCA_048628825.1-GB_2025_08_13.
H1 FASTA, original exact-assembly GFF, assembly report/stats, and provider MD5 ledger acquired and verified.
Linked H2 FASTA and assembly report/stats acquired and provider MD5 verified.
Current GCA_020745685.1 principal/GCA_020745675.1 alternate pseudohaplotypes; same male fTauAds1 isolate; direct VGP submission; exact H1 annotation GCA_020745685.1-GB_2025_12_08.
H1 FASTA, original exact-assembly GFF, assembly report/stats, and provider MD5 ledger acquired and verified.
Linked H2 FASTA and assembly report/stats acquired and provider MD5 verified.

Authoritative v5.0q deposited calls and benchmark BEDs are on CHM13v2.0, GRCh37, or GRCh38 coordinates, not either accessioned HG002 phased haplotype FASTA; they cannot be called an exact-H1 deposited modality or combined with an H1-native annotation.

The authoritative assembly directories were inventoried for each accepted individual and contain no deposited exact-H1 VCF/BCF plus callable mask. The promoted alternative is whole-H1/H2 bounded SweepGA mapping followed by IMPG-native partitioning, annotation-region VCF extraction, and an explicit targeted callable denominator; standalone WFMASH and PAF-parser BCFs are sensitivity evidence and no sparse callset was substituted for a denominator.
